category_description: Permission reject codes: user tag, desk, firm, counterparty enablement, and override requirements.

fixtures.title: User missing tag
fixtures.trigger_condition: User TRADER-42 submits an FX order but does not hold the #fx-trader permission tag required for FX trading.

expected_reject.message: User TRADER-42 is missing required permission tag #fx-trader.

fixtures.remediation: Contact the tag admin to grant #fx-trader to TRADER-42, or reassign the order to a user who holds the required tag.

fixtures.title: Desk not enabled
fixtures.trigger_condition: User TRADER-42 has the #fx-trader tag, but the EM-FX-DESK desk is not in the list of granted desks for that tag.

expected_reject.message: Desk EM-FX-DESK is not granted for user TRADER-42 under tag #fx-trader.

fixtures.remediation: Contact the desk admin to add EM-FX-DESK to the granted desks for #fx-trader, or route the order via a permitted desk.

fixtures.title: Firm not enabled
fixtures.trigger_condition: FIRM-XYZ submits an order requiring the #cross-border-equity tag, but that tag has not been granted to FIRM-XYZ at the firm level.

expected_reject.message: Firm FIRM-XYZ is not granted tag #cross-border-equity.

fixtures.remediation: Contact the firm admin to grant #cross-border-equity to FIRM-XYZ, subject to onboarding and regulatory requirements.

fixtures.title: Counterparty not enabled
fixtures.trigger_condition: The EM-RATES-DESK submits an order to trade with counterparty CPTY-OFFSHORE, which is not on the desk's enabled counterparty list.

expected_reject.message: Counterparty CPTY-OFFSHORE is not on the enabled list for desk EM-RATES-DESK.

fixtures.remediation: Have the compliance team onboard CPTY-OFFSHORE to the desk's enabled counterparty list before routing orders to them.

fixtures.title: Override required
fixtures.trigger_condition: An order's notional value of $52M exceeds the desk's $50M fat-finger cap, but no #fat-finger-override tag is present on the submitting user.

expected_reject.message: Order notional $52,000,000 exceeds desk cap $50,000,000. Tag #fat-finger-override required to proceed.

fixtures.remediation: Obtain override authorization from a supervisor holding #fat-finger-override, or reduce the order notional below the desk cap.
